active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 2 builds the evidence harness and failure taxonomy for the real v3/public benchmark path, using Phase 1 contracts and preserving LongMemEval/LoCoMo separation.

objective: Make public benchmark reports classify each failure as retrieval, evidence, context rendering, answer projection, judge, or kernel-trace related before any optimization.
scope: Read work/phase-2/context_bundle.md before any other phase-local artifact.
Discard old phase-2 artifacts from the obsolete Recall/Core-Memory chain.
Add RED tests proving retrieval_miss and evidence_hit_answer_fail cannot be conflated.
Expose retrieved evidence ids, selected context ids, rendered answer-context evidence ids, projected answer citations or unsupported status, judge status, and kernel trace events where missing.
Keep LongMemEval and LoCoMo case-level analysis separate.
Keep source_hit labeled as final projection/source overlap, not pure evidence localization.
non_goals: No retrieval optimization beyond diagnostics needed for taxonomy.
No answer prompt tuning or answer-quality optimization.
No archive attachment/scope behavior change unless missing diagnostics block taxonomy.
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: A public benchmark report test that fails if retrieval_miss and evidence_hit_answer_fail collapse into one status.
A compatibility test proving old public report consumers still receive legacy fields.
A diagnostics test proving source_hit is separate from retrieved/selected/rendered evidence ids.
A kernel trace test proving default reports do not enable kernel traces unless MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1.
smoke_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_public_benchmarks.py tests/test_agent_answer_eval.py tests/test_llm_judge.py -q
milestone_eval_commands: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30
MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30
usable_ack_checklist: Diagnostics are wired into the real v3/public benchmark path.
Tests prove retrieval miss and evidence-hit-answer-fail are distinguishable.
Legacy public report compatibility is preserved.
30-case LongMemEval and LoCoMo full-chain LLM judge runs complete, or exact provider/data blocker is recorded.

Case-level analysis lists fail-to-pass, pass-to-fail, unchanged fail, retrieval miss, evidence-hit-answer-fail, context missing evidence, answer unsupported or overconfident, and judge questionable separately.
source_hit remains final projection/source overlap and is not treated as pure evidence localization.
v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel opt-in remain intact.
No benchmark improvement is claimed from diagnostics alone.
review_focus: Reject hidden LoCoMo failures or LongMemEval-only prioritization.
Check report compatibility and no case-id hacks.
Check missing RED tests before implementation.
Check context bundle usage and phase binding.
Check v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel opt-in.
